name: Overcoming Gravity
author: Steven Low
source: Overcoming Gravity, 2nd Edition (2017) — official progression charts
description: Gymnastics-style bodyweight progressions across handstand, pulling, pushing, and misc charts. Levels map to FIG tiers (Beginner / Intermediate A-B / Advanced / Elite). Use Program detail for full ladder.
notation: Levels 1–16 per chart column; advance using Methods of Progression (Ch. 10)

charts.name: Handstand Chart
charts.emphasis: Anterior delts, traps, triceps, body control

movements.name: Press to Handstand
movements.master_step: 1.15x BW Parallel Bar Dip to HS
